recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: The Promotion
recommendations.overview: Two assistant managers of a corporate grocery store vie for a coveted promotion.

recommendations.title: Monsieur Batignole

recommendations.title: Indignation
recommendations.overview: In 1951, Marcus Messner, a working-class Jewish student from New Jersey, attends a small Ohio college, where he struggles with anti-Semitism, sexual repression, and the ongoing Korean War.

recommendations.title: Please Give
recommendations.overview: In New York City, a husband and wife butt heads with the granddaughters of the elderly woman who lives in the apartment the couple owns.

recommendations.title: The Year My Parents Went on Vacation
recommendations.overview: A boy is left alone in a Jewish neighborhood in the year of 1970, where both world cup and dictatorship happen in Brazil.

recommendations.title: Let Yourself Go
recommendations.overview: Depressed Jewish shrink Elia one day meets Claudia, a young and eccentric personal trainer.

recommendations.title: Neighboring Sounds
recommendations.overview: An independent private security firm arrives at a middle-class neighborhood in Recife, Brazil.

recommendations.title: Alien Raiders
recommendations.overview: It's the end of yet another night at Hastings Supermarket, a grocery store in Buck Lake, Arizona. But just before closing, a group of masked and armed to the teeth militants invades the store and take everyone hostage

recommendations.title: A Bronx Tale
